headlines.description: — Tyrese Haliburton said he knows he's trusted to deliver in big moments.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haliburton's 3 with 1.1 seconds left gives Pacers 120-119 stunning win over Cavs and 2-0 series lead

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Minnesota Timberwolves

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry was already in the locker room with a bag of ice against his leg when his Golden State teammates arrived for halftime with a comfortable lead.
headlines.shortLinkText: Warriors take Game 1 from cold-shooting Wolves 99-88 despite Curry's departure with hamstring strain
